benefits.description: Comically overeating - significant appetite increase at 2-3mg twice daily dose

side_effects.description: Massive appetite increase, describes eating 8000 calories

protocol_notes: User references phase 1 and phase 2 clinical trial data (2-3mg twice daily at 30mcg/kg for phase 2; up to 7-10mg at 100mcg/kg for phase 1). Personally ran 2-3mg twice daily for one week with no issues aside from appetite increase. Notes that standard peptide protocol dose (~200-300mcg) is roughly 1/10th of clinical dose and may not produce meaningful GH release on its own without a GHRH.
